title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Retail - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Retail - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!
